ksa_text: Knowledge of human-AI oversight architecture, including human-in-the-loop and human-on-the-loop design patterns, autonomy level frameworks, override and intervention mechanisms, and the governance structures required to maintain meaningful human control over AI system decisions.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-029 (AI and Machine Learning/Knowledge) scores 0.507 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.507) and is edge_case for the Data Lineage Analyst role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for analyst-level Data Lineage Analyst.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.507), and AI and Machine Learning handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI/ML competencies for Data Lineage Analyst at analyst level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI/ML overlap appears in 15-40% of Data Lineage Analyst postings depending on seniority. Core signals: 0. OOS signals: 0.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for Data Lineage Analyst. Final decision: exclude.
